layouts.app_container: min-h-screen flex flex-col bg-slate-950 text-white overflow-hidden dir-rtl font-cairo
layouts.header: flex items-center justify-between p-4 md:px-8 md:py-6 bg-slate-900/60 backdrop-blur-2xl border-b border-white/5 z-10
layouts.main_content: flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-4 md:p-8 pb-32 flex flex-col lg:flex-row gap-6 lg:gap-8
layouts.speakers_grid: grid grid-cols-3 sm:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 md:gap-8 justify-items-center w-full max-w-4xl mx-auto mt-4
layouts.chat_area: w-full lg:w-96 h-80 lg:h-full bg-slate-900/40 rounded-3xl border border-white/5 p-4 flex flex-col mt-6 lg:mt-0
layouts.bottom_bar: fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 p-4 md:px-8 md:py-5 bg-slate-950/90 backdrop-blur-3xl border-t border-white/5 flex items-center justify-center gap-3 md:gap-6 z-20 pb-safe

components.SpeakerAvatar: Circular avatar (w-16 h-16 or w-20 h-20). When active speaker: add 'speaking_indicator' glow and subtle scale. Name below with max-width truncation. Mic status icon overlaid on corner.
components.ControlBarButton: Rounded-full w-12 h-12 md:w-14 md:h-14 flex items-center justify-center transition-transform hover:scale-105. Primary action (Mic/Hand) uses lime-500. Others use slate-800 hover:bg-slate-700 text-white.
components.ChatMessage: Small rounded-2xl blocks. Mention (@name) colored in lime-400 font-bold. Disappearing messages fade out after delay.
components.Modals: Unified Shadcn dialogs. Dark glassmorphic bg, crisp white text, lime primary buttons. No generic gray overlays.
components.Tabs: Used for Requests (Speakers vs Admin) and Room Settings. Pill-shaped active tab bg-slate-800.
components.GiftsMenu: Horizontal scrolling list or grid of animated SVGs/emojis.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure white text over slate-900 meets 4.5:1 ratio.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a single RoomPage (export default function RoomPage) that integrates all the requested features.
Ensure 'dir="rtl"' is applied to the main wrapper.
Use 'slate-950' and 'lime-500' extensively. No purple or teal.
Create a mobile-first responsive layout where the chat is side-by-side on desktop but stacked or accessed via a drawer/modal on mobile.
Implement the fixed bottom bar with clear icon buttons for Mic, Video, Leave Stage, Chat (toggle on mobile), Hand Raise, Gifts, Settings.
Implement multiple view modes (Mics Grid vs Camera Video spots vs Broadcast).
Use framer-motion (<motion.div>) for smooth entrance of speakers, message bubbles, and active speaker pulsing rings.
For the active speaker, implement a glowing ring (ring-2 ring-lime-500 shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(132,204,22,0.5)]).
Load 'Cairo' font from Google Fonts (import in css or next/font) and apply 'font-cairo' class globally.
Use Shadcn UI (Dialog, Tabs, Button, Input, DropdownMenu, Avatar) for settings and requests. Style them to fit the dark theme.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. In frontend design, this creates what users call the 'AI slop' aesthetic. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: 'transition: all'. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add '.App { text-align: center; }' in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute to facilitate robust automated testing.
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...), Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...}).
DO NOT use complete 'transparent' background in header, overlays, any surface that has content under it. Example: Dropdown with transparent background.
